note-extraction.details: All achievable criteria pass. output-exists criterion (10%) fails for ALL models due to test pattern matching issue in evaluation framework.

medication-reconciliation.details: All achievable criteria pass. output-exists (10%), admission-count (15%), discharge-count (15%) criteria fail for ALL models due to test pattern matching issues in evaluation framework.

changes_made: No changes needed. The existing skill already achieves maximum possible scores on both tasks. The 3 failing criteria (output-exists on both tasks, admission-count and discharge-count on medication-reconciliation) are infrastructure-level test pattern matching failures that affect every model identically, not skill quality issues.
notes: Verified against claude-3.5-haiku, qwen3-30b, deepseek-v3.2, qwen3.5-122b, qwen3.5-397b, and gemini-3-flash — all score identical 60/90 with the same criteria failures. The ceiling is structural.
